name: Sauteed Potatoes with Garlic-Olives
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup CHOPPED OIL CURED RIPE OLIVES
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the potatoes to taste.
2. Chop 1/4 cup oil-cured ripe olives and set aside.
3. Thinly slice the scrubbed russet potatoes and blot them to absorb surface moisture.
4. In a large skillet, heat 3 tablespoons hot olive oil over medium-high heat.
5. Add the thinly sliced potatoes and toss occasionally until tender, about 20 minutes.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and a dash of nutmeg as you sauté.
7. At the end of cooking, add 2 minced cloves of garlic, 1 tablespoon chopped parsley, and 1/4 cup chopped oil-cured ripe olives.
8. Toss everything together until well combined.
